top_signals.title: AI’s Energy Crunch Has Investors Searching for Next IPO Winners
top_signals.summary: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Two tropical storms bring heavy rains to parts of Japan
top_signals.summary: The two storms helped shatter June records for rain in a number of areas in eastern and southern Chiba Prefecture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
